children.heading: Incidental transfers authorized
children.label: a Incidental transfers authorized
children.text: The Director of the Office of Management and Budget, in consultation with the Secretary, shall make such additional incidental transfers and dispositions of assets and liabilities held, used, arising from, available, or to be made available, in connection with the functions transferred by this title, as the Director may determine necessary to accomplish the purposes of this title.11See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Sunset
children.label: b Sunset
children.text: The authority provided in this section shall terminate 5 years after .July 21, 2010
